blocks.text: Real Madrid stumble — Barcelona can go seven clear tonight

Real Madrid fell 2-1 at Mallorca today, handing Barcelona a golden opportunity. Win at the Metropolitano tonight and the gap jumps to 7 points — then the same two sides meet again at Camp Nou in the Champions League quarter-finals on Wednesday.

blocks.label: ⚽ CL Quarterfinals — First Legs
items: Tue 21:00 — Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid
Wed 21:00 — Atlético Madrid vs Barcelona (the rematch)
